message:
chore(beads): add tracking issues for paragraph width caching and diff+present macrobenchmark

Add two new open issues to the beads issue tracker:

- bd-18vjh: task(text) — cache paragraph width/wrap measurements across
  frames to avoid redundant Unicode width computation and allocation-heavy
  wrap recomputation every render cycle
- bd-h0un4: task(perf) — add a reusable-buffer diff+present macrobenchmark
  for real ftui-demo-showcase screens, since current benchmarks stop at
  view() and overstate allocation patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
